task_description: Phase 18 - Truth Reset & Stub Elimination. Produce the truth audit, delete empty packages and fake stubs, reduce NoOp/placeholder count to <=5, mark mock pages with FIXME, update README, create ARCHITECTURE.md with monolith-per-app decision.

verification.summary: All 7 Phase 18 hard gates pass: install (frozen-lockfile), typecheck (79 tasks), test (81 tasks), build (58 tasks), lint (68 tasks), audit (0 high/critical), grep NoOp/placeholder count = 0 (target <=5). Exit criteria met: truth audit committed, stub count published (2 FAKE, 30 NAIVE, 10 STUB), architecture decision documented in ARCHITECTURE.md.
